extract: Zekrom (Japanese: ゼクロム Zekrom) is a dual-type Dragon/Electric Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Zekrom, Reshiram, and Kyurem are often collectively referred to as the Tao trio by fans. The group is referred to in the myths and legends of the Unova region. Zekrom is the game mascot of Pokémon White Version, appearing on its boxart. Zekrom can absofuse with Kyurem using the DNA Splicers to become Black Kyurem.
